news-global-econ.description:
President Donald Trump cannot end President Joe Biden's award of the quasi-amnesty Temporary Protected Status (TPS) to migrants because they expand U.S. Gross Domestic Product (GDP), says an appeal to the Supreme Court for an April 29 hearing.

news-global-econ.title: Ties Between Greece, United States Grow Ever Stronger: Envoys
news-global-econ.description:
ATHENS, Greece — Ties between Greece and the United States are at an all-time high, both envoys to each other’s nations say.
The post Ties Between Greece, United States Grow Ever Stronger: Envoys appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: Castro Heiress Says Dictator Raul Involved in Cuba-U.S. Talks
news-global-econ.description:
Mariela Castro, daughter of Cuba’s nonagenarian communist dictator Raúl Castro, said Thursday that her father is actively involved in the "decision-making" of the Cuban regime's negotiations with the United States.

news-global-econ.title: Elon Musk Proposes 'Universal High Income' Payments to Address AI-Driven Job Displacement
news-global-econ.description:
Tesla and xAI CEO Elon Musk has called for the United States federal government to provide "Universal HIGH INCOME" checks to citizens as he believes AI and robotics will radically reshape the employment landscape.

news-global-econ.title: State of emergency declared as US warns travelers to reconsider visiting popular getaway
news-global-econ.description: The U.S. Embassy is warning Americans to reconsider travel to Trinidad and Tobago due to crime concerns and a heightened terrorism risk on the islands.

news-global-soc.title: White House meets AI firm Anthropic amid political tensions, Pentagon dispute
news-global-soc.description: Trump administration reconsiders Anthropic ban as CEO meets White House officials to discuss Mythos Preview, a powerful new AI cybersecurity model.

news-global-soc.title: Syrian Army Takes Control of Last U.S. Military Base
news-global-soc.description:
The Syrian Army on Thursday took control of the last U.S. military base on Syrian soil, with assurances that Syria’s new government can handle the job of controlling the Islamic State and other terrorist threats.

news-global-soc.title: FIFA Host Committee, NJ Transit say plan for World Cup at MetLife Stadium will be a success amid $150 trains
news-global-soc.description: The FIFA New York New Jersey Host Committee backed NJ Transit’s World Cup transportation plan despite $150 travel costs to MetLife Stadium, as officials clashed over concerns.
